vanilla_surface: Kill Actor Story Manager event
scoring_use: Combat, protection, hunt, taboo/hostility scoring
anti_farm_rule: Direct player only; target classification; daily caps

vanilla_surface: Crime Gold, Arrest, Jail, Pay Fine events
capture_pattern: Story Manager receiver to reputation/state track
scoring_use: Imperial civic order, Stendarr justice, Nocturnal/Mephala contrast
anti_farm_rule: One award per hold/day or per major threshold

vanilla_surface: Quest stage/completion, Script Event, curated fragments
scoring_use: Daedric choices, faction allegiance, quest/lore crisis, commitment offers
anti_farm_rule: One-shot StorageUtil marker per quest/stage

vanilla_surface: Shrine activation, custom mod activators, blessing spells
capture_pattern: Curated activator script or explicit event
scoring_use: Devotional practice, cure privilege, commitment, patron refresh
anti_farm_rule: Cooldown per shrine/religion/day

vanilla_surface: Increase Skill event or quest reward
scoring_use: Learning, discipline, martial/magical practice
anti_farm_rule: Milestone bands only; no raw skill XP

vanilla_surface: Craft Item event, workbench result, item keywords/value
capture_pattern: Story Manager receiver with item classification
scoring_use: Malacath, Zenithar, Julianos, Bosmer taboo, offering creation
anti_farm_rule: Daily cap; value/quality threshold; no iron-dagger loops

vanilla_surface: Cast Magic event, spell keywords/school
capture_pattern: Story Manager receiver with spell classification
scoring_use: Restoration, necromancy taboo, Altmer magical study, Daedric magic
anti_farm_rule: Cooldown; meaningful spell families only

vanilla_surface: Change Location event, location keywords, worldspace
capture_pattern: Story Manager receiver with LocType/FormList filters
scoring_use: Sacred places, wilderness, temple, exile, community
anti_farm_rule: Per-location discovery marker and cooldown

vanilla_surface: Player alias sleep events or location-gated rest
scoring_use: Mara, Kynareth/Kyne, travel rhythm, neglect recovery
anti_farm_rule: Dawn-only consolidation; no daily chore loop

vanilla_surface: Change Relationship Rank, faction rank, curated dialogue
scoring_use: Orc community, Mara, Imperial civic belonging, Argonian community
anti_farm_rule: Meaningful thresholds only

vanilla_surface: Player Cured/Infected, disease effects, race/state checks
scoring_use: Arkay, Stendarr, Peryite, vampire/werewolf overlays
anti_farm_rule: State transition markers; no hidden repeated penalties

vanilla_surface: Player Add Item, shrine container, barter/donation scripts
scoring_use: Zenithar, ancestor rites, Daedric bargains, temple charity
anti_farm_rule: Per-religion/day cap; item whitelist; value bands

vanilla_surface: ObjectReference OnRead, PO3 BookRead, Script Event
scoring_use: Hermaeus Mora, Julianos, Xarxes/Auri-El, ancestor records
anti_farm_rule: One-shot per book or per curated knowledge tier

vanilla_surface: Player alias OnObjectEquipped/OnObjectUnequipped, WornHasKeyword conditions
capture_pattern: Alias event updates state; CK conditions gate boons
scoring_use: Amulets, armor/clothing taboos, holy symbols, Daedric artifacts
anti_farm_rule: State transition only; avoid repeated equip swapping

vanilla_surface: OnVampirismStateChanged, OnLycanthropyStateChanged, OnRaceSwitchComplete
capture_pattern: Player alias event updates curse/origin-safe state
scoring_use: Hircine, Molag Bal, Arkay, Stendarr, race curse overlays
anti_farm_rule: Transition markers; verify new-game/save-baked behavior

vanilla_surface: OnPlayerBowShot, Kill Actor, optional PO3 projectile/weapon hits
scoring_use: Hircine, Kyne/Kynareth, Bosmer hunt rites, Redguard martial practice
anti_farm_rule: Only score meaningful target/context; no target-dummy loops

vanilla_surface: CK conditions reading globals, factions, keywords, actor values, stages
scoring_use: Blessing/neglect visibility, dialogue unlocks, privileges
anti_farm_rule: Conditions read mirrors only; no score truth in CK conditions

vanilla_surface: OnUpdateGameTime or central ProcessDawn
scoring_use: Daily consolidation, decay, caps, neglect thresholds
anti_farm_rule: One central dawn pass; avoid frequent polling

vanilla_surface: PO3 BookRead, ItemHarvested, QuestStage, SpellLearned, WeatherChange, DragonSoulGained, ShoutAttack, SoulTrapped
capture_pattern: Accepted plugin event registration for hooks vanilla cannot expose cleanly
scoring_use: High-granularity religion reactions without hand-authored fragments
anti_farm_rule: Promote only selected events with caps; do not auto-score the full PO3 surface

vanilla_surface: SKSE ModEvent, StorageUtil/JContainers integration adapters
scoring_use: Survival, needs, religion, perk, or quest-mod compatibility
anti_farm_rule: Never make external mod state your mod's source of truth
